notes: Core Galaga mechanics present including formation, diving, capture beam, and dual fighter rescue, but totalTime is incremented twice per frame (in both loop and update), enemy entry animations are basic, and visual sprites use simple geometric shapes rather than authentic Galaga pixel art.
A very solid Galaga clone with formation logic, diving, and even the iconic capture/dual-ship mechanic, though the boss teleport/hover logic during capture has a minor coordinate overwrite glitch.

A solid playable Galaga-like with working waves, diving enemies, shooting, capture/dual-fighter ideas, but visuals are abstract, enemy behavior is simplified, and some capture/respawn logic feels imperfect rather than arcade-faithful.
